'''narate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nunnishly|nunnishly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nunnishly|nunnishly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| narate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:narate|narate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:naratesher|naratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:naratesherĂ«m|naratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:naratero|naratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:narateshĂ«|narateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:narateshĂ«m|narateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinaratero|gokinaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinarateshĂ«|gokinarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinarateshĂ«m|gokinarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonarankerom|gonarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonarankeshĂ«|gonarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonarankeshĂ«m|gonarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonarankeya|gonarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:naraterom|naraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:naratemu|naratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:narateya|narateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinaraterom|gokinaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinaratemu|gokinaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinarateya|gokinarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:nararate|nararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nararatesher|nararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nararatesherĂ«m|nararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nararatero|nararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nararateshĂ«|nararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nararateshĂ«m|nararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinararatero|gokinararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinararateshĂ«|gokinararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinararateshĂ«m|gokinararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonararankerom|gonararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonararankeshĂ«|gonararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonararankeshĂ«m|gonararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonararankeya|gonararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nararaterom|nararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nararatemu|nararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nararateya|nararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinararaterom|gokinararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinararatemu|gokinararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinararateya|gokinararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:nĂŠrĂŠte|nĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nĂŠrĂŠtesher|nĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|nĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠrĂŠtero|nĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|nĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|nĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠrĂŠtero|gokinĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokinĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokinĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gonĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gonĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gonĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gonĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nĂŠrĂŠterom|nĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nĂŠrĂŠtemu|nĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nĂŠrĂŠteya|nĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinĂŠrĂŠterom|gokinĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokinĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinĂŠrĂŠteya|gokinĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:nafrafte|nafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:nafraftesher|nafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafraftesherĂ«m|nafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafraftero|nafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nafrafteshĂ«|nafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafrafteshĂ«m|nafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafraftero|gokinafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinafrafteshĂ«|gokinafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafrafteshĂ«m|gokinafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gonafrafnkerom|gonafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonafrafnkeshĂ«|gonafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonafrafnkeshĂ«m|gonafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gonafrafnkeya|gonafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:nafrafterom|nafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nafraftemu|nafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:nafrafteya|nafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokinafrafterom|gokinafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinafraftemu|gokinafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokinafrafteya|gokinafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
